Hangout Sessions

03.04.2020

Event: Hangout Sessions with IHU Clinical Psychology Grads (International Students Only)

Dates: Every Wednesday and Friday for 3 weeks / 10.00-11.00

First Session: 8 April 2020, Wednesday / 10.00-11.00

Platform: Zoom Video Conferencing

Event Details:

Bored yet? So are we.
If you want to try something new. We would love to be your guests.
Brew your coffee. Go online and let’s enjoy each other’s company!
As IHU Clinical Psychology Grads we will be happy to hang out with you.
We have limited seats, please come before all of them are taken.
Registration is mandatory for participation. To register fill out the form completely:

bit.ly/IhuHangoutPsy

The event lasts 3 weeks and 6 sessions in total. Regular attendance is expected. People who do not participate in 'Positive Psychology: The path to wellbeing', can sign up.
The participation is free of charge.
